source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW, HAD1717MCW)/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/13_PMS & PMCF/4. Periodic Safety Update Report (A-PSUR-004) .docx

document.title: Periodic Safety Update Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: PSUR for ADD(HAD1417MCW), a Class IIa Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, covering post-market surveillance data through 2024.11.20.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to summarize post-market surveillance data, vigilance, CAPA, PMCF information, and PSUR update obligations under Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
keyPoints: The device is currently marketed and available for sale.
No safety or performance concerns were found in the previous PSUR.
No serious incidents, non-serious incidents, undesirable side effects, FSCA, or CAPA were reported for the reporting period.
Class IIa PSUR update period is stated as once in two years, with the next PSUR planned for December 2026.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Manufacturer organization name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.

entities.name: 3EC International a.s. (2265)
entities.evidence: NB Organisation name and number 3EC International a.s. (2265)

concepts.name: Periodic Safety Update Report
concepts.evidence: Manufacturers of class IIa, class IIb, and class III devices shall prepare a periodic safety update report in accordance with the article 86 of the Regulation (EU) 2017/745 (MDR).

concepts.name: Post-Market Surveillance
concepts.evidence: This is a report for the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector to summarize results and conclusions of the analyses of the post-market surveillance data gathered as a result of the post-market surveillance plan.

concepts.name: Post-Market Clinical Follow-up
concepts.evidence: The data that should be reported in this section consist of other PMS datasets not referred to above and are generated by general methods and procedures of PMCF.

concepts.name: Field Safety Corrective Actions
concepts.evidence: During the reporting period, there were no Field Safety Corrective Actions (FSCA) initiated for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.

concepts.name: Class IIa PSUR update period
concepts.evidence: Manufacturers of class IIa devices shall update the PSUR when necessary and at least every two years.

evidence.claim: The report covers the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector ADD(HAD1417MCW).
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector Model Name HAD1417MCW Trade Name ADD

evidence.claim: The device is currently marketed and available for sale.
evidence.evidenceText: Status of the device(s) The device is currently marketed and available for sale.

evidence.claim: The intended purpose is general radiographic digital imaging for human anatomy and not mammography.
evidence.evidenceText: ADD(HAD1417MCW) are indicated for digital imaging solution designed for general radiographic system for human anatomy. It is intended to replace film or screen based radiographic systems in all general purpose diagnostic procedures. Not to be used for mammography.

evidence.claim: The reporting data collection period is 2023.01.01 to 2024.11.20.
The PSUR reference number is PSUR-2024.
No safety or performance concerns were found in the previous PSUR.
evidence.evidenceText: No safety or performance concerns were found in previous PUSR.

evidence.claim: No non-serious incidents were reported during the reporting period.
evidence.evidenceText: During the reporting period, no non-serious incidents were reported for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.

evidence.claim: No undesirable side effects were reported during the reporting period.
evidence.evidenceText: During the reporting period, there have been no undesirable side effects reported for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.

evidence.claim: No Field Safety Corrective Actions were initiated during the reporting period.
evidence.evidenceText: During the reporting period, there were no Field Safety Corrective Actions (FSCA) initiated for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.

evidence.claim: Corrective and preventive actions are listed as none.
evidence.evidenceText: Corrective and / or Preventive Actions (CAPA) : None

evidence.claim: No specific PMCF studies were initiated during the reporting period.
evidence.evidenceText: There have been no specific post-market clinical follow-up studies (PMCF) initiated for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector during this reporting period.

evidence.claim: The PSUR update period for this Class IIa device is once in two years.
evidence.evidenceText: PSUR Update Period Once in two years

evidence.claim: The next PSUR is planned for December 2026.
evidence.evidenceText: Next PSUR will be conducted on December 2026.

evidence.claim: The document states compliance with IEC 60601-1 Safety class I requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: In compliance with IEC 60601-1, this medical equipment complies with the requirements for Safety class I.

reviewFlags.reason: Metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the body primarily references Regulation (EU) 2017/745, EUDAMED, and a notified body.
Source path and productSignal reference HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW or HAD/A/F 1417-1717, but the document body identifies only ADD(HAD1417MCW).
Certificate ID is not provided; the document states Certificate ID is in the progress of conformity assessment.
Some text appears template-like or low quality, including prompts such as 'You can cite databases such as' and OCR or spelling issues such as 'Digital Falt Panel' and 'PUSR'.
Estimated population using the device is not provided and tables contain '-' entries.
